log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Warforged — Unarmored Caster.
→ Warforged — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 17 necrotic damage (half).
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Warforged — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 27 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 0 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Warforged — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 25 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===

=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster's turn ---

ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.

Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===

--- Lich's turn ---

→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
